title: Compensation Log Records
content:
# DBMS Revision

*   **Slotted Page:** Header slots store offsets to records; defragmentation changes offsets but preserves RIDs.
*   **B+ Tree Fan-out:** $F \le \frac{P + K}{D + K}$. Fan-out determines tree height and disk I/O reads.
*   **ARIES recovery:** Analysis $\to$ Redo (repeats history) $\to$ Undo (rolls back active transactions, logging CLRs).


*   **Compensation Log Records Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
